## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Tested locally in browser

## UI Changes

- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI changed (add screenshots / video below)

## Screenshots / video (if applicable)

Add before/after screenshots or a video demonstrating the changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and small
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] Ready for review
